info.name: Corpus API
info.description:
Complete API collection for the Corpus 🗣️💼 platform.

Base URL: http://localhost:8000

Phase 1 endpoints are fully functional.
Phase 2 endpoints (Auth, Custom Vocab) return 501 until implemented.

Swagger UI: http://localhost:8000/api/docs
ReDoc:       http://localhost:8000/api/redoc

variable.description: Change to your deployed URL for production testing
JWT Bearer token — set after calling /api/auth/login (Phase 2)

item.name: 🏥 Health
item.description: Service liveness check. Used by Docker healthcheck and uptime monitors.

request.description: Returns 200 OK with service status when the backend is running.

item.name: 📂 Projects
item.description: Upload and analyze project markdown files to extract professional domain and skills.

formdata.description: A Markdown (.md) file describing your project

request.description:
Upload a `.md` file. The backend extracts domain, subdomains, and skills.

**Phase 1:** Returns a simulated Gemini response.
**Phase 2:** Calls the real Gemini API.

response.name: 200 OK — Analysis result

item.name: 📚 Vocabulary
item.description: Browse learning tracks and vocabulary term lists by professional domain.

request.description: Returns a summary list of all available learning tracks (no vocabulary terms).

response.name: 200 OK — Track list

request.description: Full vocabulary list for the Startup & Venture Capital track.

response.name: 200 OK — Vocabulary list

request.description: Full vocabulary list for the Software Engineering & Tech track.
Full vocabulary list for the Business & Product Management track.
**Phase 2 only.** Returns 501 until auth + DB is implemented.

response.name: 501 Not Implemented

item.name: 💬 Chat & Roleplay
item.description: Interact with AI coach personas for roleplay-based language practice.

request.description: Returns the available AI coach persona name and title for each track.

response.name: 200 OK — Persona list

request.description:
Send a user message and receive an AI coach reply.

**Phase 1:** Returns scripted responses in sequence.
**Phase 2:** Returns real Gemini AI replies.

response.name: 200 OK — Coach reply

request.description: Practice a system design conversation with the tech architect coach.
Practice stakeholder communication with the business director coach.

item.name: 🔐 Authentication [Phase 2]
item.description: User registration and login. All endpoints return 501 until Phase 2 is implemented.

request.description: Create a new account. **Returns 501 until Phase 2.**
Log in and receive a JWT Bearer token. **Returns 501 until Phase 2.**
Get the authenticated user's profile. **Returns 501 until Phase 2.**
